valid.name: already-aligned
single-row
valid.code:
-- Single-row VALUES: nothing to align against; rule is a no-op.
INSERT INTO t (a, b) VALUES ('GPT-5', 1.25);

invalid.name: over-padded
invalid.code:
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES
  ('GPT-5',                 1.25, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),
  ('Claude',                5,    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),
  ('Haiku',                 1,    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

errors.message: VALUES rows are not vertically aligned: column widths can shrink to fit the current rows.

invalid.output:
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES
  ('GPT-5',  1.25, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),
  ('Claude', 5,    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP),
  ('Haiku',  1,    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
